topic: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses)

sections.title: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Review and mix all Present, Past, and Future tense forms in one set of exercises. Rules: Identify the time clue in a sentence to choose the correct tense | Present tenses use am/is/are or have/has; Past tenses use was/were or had; Future tenses use will | "Continuous" always has -ing; "Perfect" always has V3 (past participle) | Practice converting one sentence across all 12 tenses to build fluency
sections.formula: Review and mix all Present, Past, and Future tense forms in one set of exercises

examples.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I have been eating rice for an hour.

sections.title: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Review and mix all Present, Past, and Future tense forms in one set of exercises

examples.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा था।
examples.english: I had been eating rice for an hour.

examples.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा होऊँगा।
examples.english: I will have been eating rice for an hour.

sections.title: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Office & Professional Usage

sections.explanation: Practice Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Review and mix all Present, Past, and Future tense forms in one set of exercises

examples.hindi: वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही है।
examples.english: She has been working for two hours.

sections.title: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) — Negative and Question Forms

sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses). Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Review and mix all Present, Past, and Future tense forms in one set of exercises

examples.hindi: वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही थी।
examples.english: She had been working for two hours.
